title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
